params.name: Hagakure
params.description:
On Feb 28, 1716 AD, after seven years, Tashiro Tsuramoto finally completed compiling Hagakure.
Hagakure, or its full name, Hagakure Kikigaki, is a spiritual guide for samurai that consists of eleven volumes. It features commentaries by Yamamoto Tsunetomo and compiled by Tashiro Tsuramoto. It is essentially a code of conduct or "the way of the warrior". It promotes the qualities of loyalty, courage, discipline, and benevolence. It advocates that samurai should be ready to die for their lords w …
